installIosIntro: To install this app on your iPhone or iPad, please follow these steps:
installIos1: 1. Tap the Share button in Safari
installAndroidIntro: For the best experience, open this page in Google Chrome. If you are already using Chrome or another browser, follow these steps:
installAndroid2: 2. Look for Install App, Add to Home Screen, or Add shortcut
installAndroid3: 3. Confirm and the app will be added to your Home Screen
installDesktopIntro: If the automatic prompt didn't appear, you can install manually:
installDesktop1: 1. Click the Browser Menu (⋮ three dots)
installDesktop2: 2. Select Install App or Install RH_Eletropasso
